import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms'; @Component({ selector: 'app-registration', templateUrl: './registration.component.html', styleUrls: ['./registration.component.scss'] }) export class RegistrationComponent { form!: FormGroup; constructor(private fb: FormBuilder){} get f(): any{ return this.form.controls; } ngOnInit(): void{ this.validation(); } private validation(): void{ this.form = this.fb.group({ fistname: ['', Validators.required], lastname: ['', Validators.required], email: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.email]], username: ['', Validators.required], senha: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.minLength(6)]], confirmeSenha:['', Validators.required] }); } }
